meta.title: Alexander Müller-Hermann — Licensed Tour Guide in Athens & Greece
meta.description: Private and small-group tours of the Acropolis, the Acropolis Museum, Athens and all of Greece. Led in German, English and Greek by a licensed guide with an MA in Classical Archaeology from LMU Munich.

hero.name: Alexander Müller‑Hermann
hero.tagline: Walk Athens and Greece with experience — an archaeologist bringing history to life, in German, English or Greek.

credentials.license: Licensed by the Greek Ministry of Tourism

about.heading: An archaeologist's eye, at home in two cultures
paragraphs: Born in Munich and raised between Munich and Athens, I grew up reading the ancient writers in their own scripts. After completing my secondary education at the German School of Athens, I returned to Munich to study Classical Archaeology at Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität, where I earned my Master of Arts.

Today I am a guide licensed by the Greek Ministry of Tourism, leading visitors through the Acropolis, its museum, and sites across the country. Every walk I lead is grounded in primary sources and a deep, personal love for the places I show you.

tours.heading: Signature itineraries
tours.subheading: Six routes I lead most often. Each can be tailored — duration, pace, depth — to your group.

acropolis.title: The Acropolis & Parthenon
acropolis.description: Greece's most iconic monument — the sacred Acropolis hill, crowned by the Parthenon, Erechtheion, Propylaea, and the Temple of Athena Nike, as it rose in the 5th century BC.

museum.title: The Acropolis Museum
museum.description: From the archaic korai to the surviving Parthenon marbles, told through the latest scholarship and the museum's superb staging.

agora.title: Ancient Agora & Plaka
agora.description: The civic heart of classical Athens — Stoa of Attalos, Hephaisteion, the Odeon of Agrippa — followed by a slow walk through Plaka.

delphi.title: Delphi day-trip
delphi.description: The omphalos of the ancient world. Sanctuary of Apollo, the Tholos at Marmaria, and a museum visit including the Charioteer.

sounion.title: Cape Sounion & Poseidon
sounion.description: An afternoon drive down the Athenian Riviera to Poseidon's temple on the headland, timed for sunset over the Aegean.

custom.title: Custom Greece itineraries
custom.description: Mycenae & Epidauros, Olympia, Meteora, the Cyclades — multi-day routes designed around your interests, season, and pace.

languages.heading: Three languages, native-fluent
languages.subheading: Tours can begin in one language and continue in another — useful for mixed family groups.

de.name: Deutsch
de.note: Born and educated in Munich; family language at home.

en.name: English
en.note: Working language for academic publication and most international guests.

el.name: Ελληνικά
el.note: Half my life spent in Greece — schooled in Athens at the Deutsche Schule.

contact.heading: Plan your visit
contact.subheading: Tell me your dates, the size of your group, and what you'd like to see. I usually reply within a day.
contact.emailBody:
Hello Alexander,

I'd like to ask about a tour. My dates are:
Group size:
Interests:

Thank you,
